title: Attack on Titan
description: Humanity struggles to survive against gigantic Titans behind massive walls.

title: Demon Slayer
description: Tanjiro joins the Demon Slayer Corps to save his sister and defeat demons.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
description: Yuji Itadori enters the world of curses after swallowing a cursed object.

title: Naruto
description: A young ninja dreams of becoming the strongest leader of his village.

title: One Piece
description: Monkey D. Luffy sails the seas searching for the legendary One Piece treasure.

title: Death Note
description: A student discovers a notebook that can kill anyone whose name is written in it.

title: Bleach
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains Soul Reaper powers and protects the living from evil spirits.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
description: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone after a failed alchemy experiment.

title: Hunter x Hunter
description: Gon Freecss sets out to become a Hunter and find his father.

title: My Hero Academia
description: A powerless boy enters a superhero academy after inheriting an incredible power.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
description: Ken Kaneki becomes half-ghoul and struggles between two worlds.

title: Chainsaw Man
description: Denji gains chainsaw powers and fights deadly devils.

title: Black Clover
description: Asta seeks to become the Wizard King despite having no magical abilities.

title: Solo Leveling
description: The world's weakest hunter gains a mysterious power that lets him level up.

title: Spy x Family
description: A spy, assassin, and telepath form an unusual family.
